motivo: código extraído mas apenas 5/6 seções presentes
resposta:
solution:
def brokenCalc(self, startValue: int, target: int) -> int:
    count = 0
    while startValue != target:
        if startValue * 2 <= target:
            startValue //= 2
        else:
            startValue -= 1
        count += 1
    return count

efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(log(target))
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
